scripts.build: npx esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=browser --target=es2022 --outfile=dist/main.js --format=esm && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),dest='D:/FoundryVTT/Data/modules/fvtt-claude-connector/dist/main.js';try{fs.copyFileSync('dist/main.js',dest);console.log('[build] Copied to Foundry modules')}catch(e){if(e.code!=='ENOENT')throw e}"
